'''Berri''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was a hot, smog-shrouded world with high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] and a dense [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Berrite]] [[Species/Legends|species]], which evolved to become master foragers due to its few natural food sources. There was a lack of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] trade with Berri, and its inhabitants cultivated a heavy, hand-crafted industry that harnessed power from natural geothermic energies.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 12" />

{{Planet-stub}}
